methodology.test: Mann-Whitney U (two-sided, tie-corrected, normal approximation with continuity correction)
methodology.rationale: Impression counts are heavily right-skewed; rank-based tests are robust to that shape. Cliff's delta floor of 0.20 excludes tiny-but-significant differences that aren't practically actionable.

The Cubs ended a 10-GAME SKID last night with a 10-4 rout. Tonight they can earn a series split against Paul Skenes and a Pirates team that's been gritty all month.

The momentum is there.

Iowa dropped their eighth straight game Wednesday, 6-3 to Memphis. Connor Noland was carted off after a comebacker hit his ankle — status unknown.

Kane Kepley homered in the seventh for the lone bright spot in a rough stretch.

#Cubs #MLB

On May 8 the Cubs were 15 games over .500.

In those 17 days: rotation ERA above 6.00, offense 28th in OPS, pitching 28th in ERA, 12 losses in 14 games. They've gone from the NL's hottest team to clinging to a wild card spot.

This isn't a

Jordan Wicks: 0.60 ERA in his last three Iowa starts — 15 innings, 7 hits, 1 run.

Horton out until 2027. Steele hit a setback. Taillon leads the majors in HRs allowed. The Cubs' rotation is in crisis mode, and Wicks has earned his shot.

#

Cards at 25-18 and climbing. Misiorowski just threw 6 shutout innings for the Brewers. Yelich working his way back.

The NL Central is ALIVE — and the Cubs at 29-16 are leading it with a target on their backs.

Feels right.

#Cubs #NorthSid

Happ's BA is .234. His wRC+ is 144. 👀

10 HRs. 424 feet. Team lead. That's an ELITE power profile doing the work.

Tight game vs. Sale? He didn't care.

#Cubs #FlyTheW #GoCubs

Happ's bat finally WOKE UP in Atlanta. 🔥

Brown stayed hot. Slump? What slump?

Sometimes a road trip is exactly what this lineup needed.

#Cubs #FlyTheW #GoCubs

Four straight losses. Now Sale on the mound and Ben Brown answering the call.

Not ideal. But Brown's been scrappy.

The lineup NEEDS to wake up. Brewers are next.

#Cubs #GoCubs #CubNation

Imanaga gave 'em 7+ innings of FILTH and still walked away with an L.

That's the most frustrating sentence in baseball.

Ace did his job. Now the rest need to catch up.

#Cubs #GoCubs #CubNation

First pitch in 80 minutes. Wrigley Field. Cubs-Astros, Game 1 of 3.

Houston sends Arrighetti (5-1, 1.50 ERA) — .173 opponent BA through seven starts. Taillon (2-3, 4.97) needs to match his level today.

Win this one.

#Cubs #GoCubs #FlyThe

bottom_performers.text:
Bregman's solo shot was REAL.

The rest? Not enough. Three straight losses hurts.

This offense needs to wake up before a skid becomes a story.

#Cubs #GoCubs #CubNation

Cubs' No. 6 prospect is doing something RARE in the minors. 👀

Elite walk rate. Elite steal rate. The kid doesn't chase and doesn't stop.

Plate discipline + speed is a cheat code. Watch him climb.

#Cubs #GoCubs #CubNation

Two 10-game win streaks. One 10-game skid. All in the same season.

The 2026 Cubs just joined the 2017 Dodgers as the ONLY teams in MLB history to pull that off.

That's this team. Maddening, electric, and completely unlike anything else.

#Cubs #ChicagoCubs #MLB

Cubs 7, Pirates 2. Happ 2-run HR, Suzuki 2 hits and 2 RBI. The Cubs handed Skenes his 3rd straight loss and split the Pittsburgh series.

Skenes fanned 10 in 5.1 IP but 2 Pittsburgh errors in the 6th gifted a 3-0 lead. Cubs leave Pittsburgh at 31-26. 🔥
